version.name: 0.40-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.40-beta :
+ Flux: Added the Flux feature. It operates independently of REAPER's native mechanisms and supports LFO and Envelope modulation for FX parameters. + Quick Render: Added Render-in-Place for selected items, featuring customizable preset rules. + Render Queue: Now supports exporting a specific item directly from the Render Queue. + UTF-8 Compatibility: Optimized compatibility for UTF-8 encoding. + Auto Transient Detection: Optimized performance for the Automatic Transient Detection service.
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.20
